---
title: ir fixture bare quarto
format: html
ir:
  exclude-newer: 2026-06-01
---

```{r}
# No declared dependencies: the resolver still injects rmarkdown so the knitr
# engine has what it needs to render. Attach rmarkdown so path.package can
# report where it loaded from, then confirm that is ir's resolved run library
# (the first R_LIBS entry ir prepends). Both paths are normalised so the renv
# symlink resolves to the same target on either side.
suppressPackageStartupMessages(library("rmarkdown", character.only = TRUE))
lib <- strsplit(
  Sys.getenv("R_LIBS"),
  .Platform$path.sep,
  fixed = TRUE
)[[1]][[1]]
expected <- normalizePath(file.path(lib, "rmarkdown"), mustWork = TRUE)
in_cache <- normalizePath(path.package("rmarkdown"), mustWork = TRUE) ==
  expected

cat("ir.fixture=qmd-bare\n")
cat("bare.rmarkdown_in_cache=", tolower(in_cache), "\n", sep = "")
cat(
  "bare.rmarkdown_version=",
  read.dcf(file.path(expected, "DESCRIPTION"), "Version")[1, 1],
  "\n",
  sep = ""
)
```
